---
title: "Project Title"
description: "One-line summary that appears on the project card."
date: "2026-01-15"
categories: [machine-learning, nlp]
image: ../images/project-thumb.png
image-alt: "Thumbnail for this project"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
---

## Overview

A short paragraph describing the problem, approach, and outcome.

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/rqhq/REPO)
- [Live demo](https://example.com)  <!-- delete if not applicable -->

## Tech stack

Python, scikit-learn, pandas, ...

## Report

<iframe src="../pdfs/PROJECT_REPORT.pdf" width="100%" height="650px" style="border: 1px solid #ccc;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](../pdfs/PROJECT_REPORT.pdf)

<!--
  ## Notebook

  Two options for showing a notebook — pick ONE and uncomment the section
  (move it outside this HTML comment block).

  Option A — embed the rendered notebook inline:
      {{</* embed ../notebooks/PROJECT_NOTEBOOK.ipynb echo=true */>}}
      (remove the /* and */ to activate)

  Option B — link out to the .ipynb so users can download/open it:
      [Open notebook →](../notebooks/PROJECT_NOTEBOOK.ipynb)

  IMPORTANT: in Quarto, the {{< ... >}} shortcode is processed BEFORE
  HTML comments are stripped, so you can't just wrap it in <!-- --> to
  disable it. Use the {{</* ... */>}} escape (as above) or delete the
  line entirely. The build fails if the referenced .ipynb is missing.
-->

## Results

Key findings, plots, takeaways.
